daily.today_energy: Your vibe is magnetic rn. The cosmos is giving you permission to take up space and be unapologetically you. Channel that main character energy—people are watching and they're here for it.
daily.love: Whether you're coupled or solo, authenticity is your love language today. If you've been holding back how you really feel, the universe is basically nudging you to speak up. Real connections thrive on realness.
daily.career: Your ideas hit different right now. Don't let imposter syndrome dim your light—trust that gut instinct about a project or direction. Your creative problem-solving is exactly what's needed in your space.
daily.health: Your body's asking you to move in ways that feel good, not obligatory. Dance, stretch, walk—whatever makes you feel alive. Rest isn't laziness; it's your superpower recharging itself.

weekly.overview: This week's cosmic energy is asking you to embrace your authentic self, Leo. There's a magnetic pull toward meaningful conversations and deeper connections. Trust the timing of things unfolding around you.
weekly.love: Venus is whispering sweet possibilities into your orbit. Whether you're coupled or single, emotional honesty is your superpower right now. Let someone see the real you beneath the sparkle.
weekly.career: Your creative instincts are firing on all cylinders. This is the week to pitch that idea you've been sitting on or take on a project that genuinely excites you. Your passion is contagious.
weekly.health: Your body's asking for intentional movement and rest in equal measure. Find activities that feel joyful rather than obligatory—dancing, walking, whatever makes you feel alive and grounded.
